# PHIL.083 ? Virtue Ethics

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** virtue_ethics
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Character over rules; Aristotelian revival; virtues and vices; eudaimonia; practical wisdom (phronesis); role models

## Application
Cultivate virtues; practical wisdom; character development; emulate exemplars; holistic moral formation; flourishing

## Key Values
- Virtue
- Character
- Practical wisdom
- Flourishing
